---
title: "#omicidx"
format: gfm
---


## 2020-03-10

*20:41:02 - @Sean Davis has joined the channel*
**Sean Davis** (20:41:02):
> set the channel description: [https://omicidx.cancerdatasci.org/](https://omicidx.cancerdatasci.org/)

*20:41:59 - @Sean Davis has left the channel*

## 2020-06-06

*19:58:37 - @Olagunju Abdulrahman has joined the channel*

## 2020-12-02

*05:43:10 - @Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles) has joined the channel*
*05:43:12 - @Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles) has left the channel*

## 2021-01-22

*15:44:50 - @Annajiat Alim Rasel has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-20

*01:57:52 - @watanabe_st has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-11

*16:45:18 - @Megha Lal has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-18

*01:01:54 - @Roy Storey has joined the channel*

## 2022-01-28

*11:13:54 - @Megha Lal has left the channel*

## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (10:09:38):
> archived the channel
